form.formComment: At the latest run 9th of 14 at Marseille-Borely on April 3 over 1700m, 6 len behind Merci Elie carrying 59.5kg at $45. Before that 9th of 12 at Marseille Vivaux on March 22 over 1500m, 5 len behind Tashanka carrying 55kg at $10. Will need to do a bit more.

form.formComment: At the latest run favourite; won by 1.75 len at Marseille-Borely April 3 over 1700m defeating Chop Val with 60.5kg at $3. Before that 7th of 13 at Marseille-Borely on March 18 over 2000m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Pestacle carrying 57kg at $9.40. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.

form.formComment: Returns from a 29-day let-up. At the latest run raced on the pace before fading ran last of 13 at Marseille-Borely on March 18 over 2000m, slow going 31 len behind Pestacle with 58.5kg at $9.20. The start before that won by a head at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather February 21 over 1600m defeating Terredeguerre with 55.5kg at $19. Has ability and can make amends.

form.formComment: Last start gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 8 at Marseille-Borely on April 10 over 2100m, head behind Linaria carrying 58.5kg at $4.20. Before that 3rd of 13 at Marseille-Borely on March 18 over 2000m, slow going 2.5 len behind Tiberiana with 60kg at $5.70. Hard to get excited about her chances.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 10 at Marseille Vivaux on March 22 over 1500m, 4 len behind Golden Brown with 56kg at $6.50. The start before that 4th of 11 at Marseille Vivaux on March 4 over 1500m, 1.3 len behind Cayssie Ma Star with 56kg at $3.50. Will be harder to beat this time.

form.formComment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. At the latest run 5th of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on March 16 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Modern Spirit with 57.5kg at $14. The race before that 11th of 16 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 14 over 1800m, 7 len behind Zolia carrying 59kg at $12. Finds a nice race this time and is expected to go very well.
